subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast fixed thy gaze upon God! In this moment, as I commune with thoughts of thee, my pen is in swift motion and my soul is immersed in delight and felicity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله در ایندم که بیاد تو همدمم قلم در جولان است و جان در روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
